case_title: SHABAZZ, FATIMAH I. VS BOOKER, MELVIN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHABAZZ, FATIMAH I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOOKER, MELVIN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,110.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF THE CURRENT FAIR MARKET VALUE OF THE 1960 PONTIAC BONNEVILLE INCLUDING COST OF RECENT REPAIRS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHABAZZ, FATIMAH I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOOKER, MELVIN $2,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,860.00, MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT GRANTED. JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS; STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SHABAZZ, FATIMAH I. AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKER, MELVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BOOKER, MELVIN HEARING SET FOR JAN-03-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. TRIAL HELD TODAY. BOTH MATTERS ARE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKER, MELVIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED OCT-11-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKER, MELVIN
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY BOOKER, MELVIN IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
